metadata.description: Plugins produit — specs, analytics PostHog, gestion de bugs et maintenance des plugins

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Adds /prd-builder to write structured product specs and create Notion pages

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Adds /kpi-visualizer and /kpi-generator to analyze product usage and define KPIs

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Adds /slack-to-notion-bug to create Notion tickets from Slack messages

plugins.name: tooling
plugins.description: Adds /plugin-lint to audit Claude Code plugins and marketplaces against official best practices
